column1: “My nephew is a very capable young man,” - The woman says that _______nephew is a very capable young man.
"Jack may go to the party with Alice", said Hazel. - Hazel said Jack ... to the party with Alice.
"I finished my homework", said Alex. - Alex said he ... his homework.
"It is breaking!", said Henry. - Henry said it ...
"I am watching this show at the moment", said Rose. - Rose said she ... that show at that moment..
"Do you always spend your time here?" - he said. - He asked her if she always spent her time_________
"Do they invite Martin?" he asked. - He asked if they____________Martin.
“Do you know when she will return?” he said. - He asked if I____________when she would return
"Does he like pizza?" they said. - They asked if he________pizza.
I don’t think ___________ of them are at home.
